name: story-skills
description: A suite of cross-referenced skills and CLI maintenance tools for end-to-end story writing powered by markdown. Covers story initialization, character management, worldbuilding, plot structure, chapter writing, validation, indexing, word counts, and manuscript export.

interface.shortDescription: Plan stories, manage characters and worlds, and write chapters.
interface.longDescription: Story Skills adds end-to-end fiction-writing workflows for Codex: story initialization, character management, worldbuilding, plot structure, chapter writing, and deterministic project maintenance with markdown registries and YAML frontmatter.
